feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Personal homepage of Tao Liu, a master's student in AI at Southeast University, PALM Lab.

entry.title: hello, blog
entry.content:
This is the first post on my new homepage.

I plan to use this blog as a lightweight notebook for research ideas, paper reading notes, engineering logs, and reflections from my work in artificial intelligence.

The homepage is now based on al-folio, which gives the site a clean academic style while keeping blog posts, publications, projects, and CV pages easy to maintain.
entry.summary: Opening a new space for research notes, project logs, and learning reflections.
